title: Comfort Systems USA: The Run Continues
text: Comfort Systems USA, Inc. has seen continued growth in sales and margin expansion, leading to a 40% increase in share price. The company has engaged in bolt-on acquisitions to add to its sales, such as the purchase of Eldeco early this year and most recently DECCO, Inc. Despite the strong performance, I have concerns about a potential reversal in growth and margins, leading to a cautious approach to investing in Comfort Systems USA, Inc.
